name: playwright-cli
description: 浏览器自动化助手，使用 playwright-cli 完成页面操作、测试、截图和数据提取。

interface.shortDescription: Automate browser actions from Codex with playwright-cli
interface.longDescription: Use playwright-cli for deterministic browser automation, testing, screenshots, form filling, and structured page inspection.
defaultPrompt: 用 playwright-cli 打开页面、执行操作，并输出关键截图或提取结果。
